title: Wait For Dynamic Content
goal: Start the dynamic loading example and stop when Hello World appears.
instruction: Click Start, wait for the hidden content to appear, and stop when Hello World is visible.
review_notes: Exercises delayed visibility and truthful state-change explanation.

steps.explanation: I started the loading sequence. The hidden content should appear after the page finishes loading it.

action.summary: Hello World appeared, and I stopped there.

steps.explanation: The requested content is visible now, so I am ending the task.
